name: WhatsApp Restaurant Bot Pro 10/10 - Fixed & Tested

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM user_sessions WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}' ORDER BY last_seen DESC LIMIT 1

nodes.name: Load Session from DB (Uses sanitized phone from earlier)

parameters.query:
=UPDATE user_sessions SET 
  table_number = {{ $json.table_number }}, 
  last_seen = NOW() 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}' 
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO user_sessions (phone, table_number, customer_name, cart, preferences, last_seen, session_started, total_orders)
SELECT '{{ $json.from }}', {{ $json.table_number }}, '{{ $json.contact_name }}', '[]', '{}', NOW(), NOW(), 0
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM user_sessions WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}');

nodes.name: Save Table to Session (Uses sanitized phone from earlier)

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM menu_items WHERE available = true AND category != 'hidden' ORDER BY category, name
=SELECT * FROM menu_items WHERE id = {{ $json.item_id }} AND available = true LIMIT 1

=UPDATE user_sessions SET 
  cart = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.cart) }}', 
  last_seen = NOW() 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}'

nodes.name: Update Cart in DB (Uses sanitized phone from earlier)

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO orders (order_id, phone, table_number, items, subtotal, tax, total, status, created_at) 
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.order_id }}', 
  '{{ $json.from }}', 
  {{ $json.session.table }}, 
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.cart) }}', 
  {{ $json.subtotal }}, 
  {{ $json.tax }}, 
  {{ $json.total }}, 
  'pending', 
  NOW()
) RETURNING *

nodes.name: Save Order to DB (Uses sanitized phone from earlier)

parameters.query:
=UPDATE user_sessions SET 
  cart = '[]', 
  last_seen = NOW(), 
  total_orders = total_orders + 1 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}'

nodes.name: Clear Cart After Order (Uses sanitized phone from earlier)

parameters.query:
=UPDATE orders SET 
  status = 'paid', 
  paid_at = NOW() 
WHERE order_id = '{{ $json.order_id }}' 
RETURNING *
=UPDATE user_sessions SET cart = '[]', last_seen = NOW() WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}'
=SELECT * FROM orders WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
=SELECT * FROM orders WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
=UPDATE user_sessions SET cart = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.cart) }}', last_seen = NOW() WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}'
